THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YUAN, STEVEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIWATA, RICHARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREMISES RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 11/13/03 THROUGH JUDGMENT DATED 10/28/03 . $6,047.82 RENT, $485.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $362.23 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,895.05, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( NO ENVELOPE, PLACE IN THE PICK-UP BOX )
